name: The Hunter Cursed by Night
short_description: A short-and-sweet 1-bit adventure game with real-time combat. Engage in ranged or close combat to defeat supernatural monsters. Upgrade your tools to progress deeper into the woods and seek revenge, or seek greater power by conquering dungeons and the powerful bosses inside.
detailed_description:
Explore Woods

Explore a dark wood, haunted graveyard, and damp caves as you seek revenge against a vicious werewolf. Navigate the forest to learn more about your mentor's past and avenge his death.

Hunt Monsters

Fight Against Monsters Using Various tools.


Whip - Weak against enemies but causes stun. Useful for escaping tough situations
Salt - Hits enemies in a large area, but only useful against some supernatural enemies.
Gun - Powerful ranged attack for dropping large monsters.
Shovel - Melee weapon for close-combat. Take out enemies before they get too close.

Upgrade Gear

Talk to merchants to save you game and upgrade your gear. Choose to upgrade your gun, salt, or health, or purchase useful items such as potions.

Conquer Bosses

Powerful monsters, such as the King of Goblins, are hiding useful gear that will aid in your adventure. Other bosses block the path forward and will get you closer to your goal. These tough beasts will provide a challenge, but lead to great reward.
